title: Sixth Year
prose: N.E.W.T. classes are smaller — half the year didn't get the O.W.L. grade to continue, and the ones who did find the pace has changed completely. Professors stop reminding you to take notes; they assume it now.

There's a heaviness to the castle this year that wasn't there before, hard to name exactly — nothing anyone says outright, just a sense that the adults around you are watching the news a little too closely.

choices.label: Push it aside and get to your first N.E.W.T. lesson.
